title: 8 fixes — Blocked users filtered, restrict mode now actually silent, PWA polish
notes: CRITICAL FIX: Blocked users' posts will no longer appear in your feed (the block button worked but no consumer was filtering — fixed feed render AND realtime INSERT).
CRITICAL FIX: Blocked users' moments are now filtered from the stories strip (was showing their avatar + their moments still played).

FIX: Restrict mode in chat header now takes effect IMMEDIATELY (was waiting until you reloaded the app). 3 stale-closure regressions defeating Round 2's silent-restrict feature — inbox notifications, chat-level notifications, and the global app badge ALL ignored the restrict toggle until reload.
FIX: Android home-screen app icon no longer mangled — dropped maskable icon variants (React-atom logo had no safe zone to mask).
FIX: Changing your name in Edit Profile now updates the top-bar avatar's tooltip immediately (was waiting for next reload).
FIX: Ringtone stops when you background the tab during an incoming call (prevents residual scheduled oscillators firing all at once when you come back).
